case_title: AZIZA DE LA TORRE ET AL VS. THE NEW YORK TIMES COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-13-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE NEW YORK TIMES COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS AZIZA DE LA TORRE AND JOAQUIN DE LA TORRE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE NEW YORK TIMES COMPNAY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KRISTEN HAMILTON, OPERATIONS MANAGER NYT'S WEST COAST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DE LA TORRE, AZIZA DE LA TORRE, JOAQUIN AS TO DEFENDANT THE NEW YORK TIMES COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA TORRE, AZIZA DE LA TORRE, JOAQUIN AS TO DEFENDANT THE NEW YORK TIMES COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LA TORRE, AZIZA DE LA TORRE, JOAQUIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE NEW YORK TIMES COMPANY THE DEFENDANT ACTED REASONABLE AND IN GOOD FAITH TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S OPT OUT REQUEST TO END DEFENDANT'S MAIL SOLICITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE NEW YORK TIMES COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JOAQUIN DE LA TORRE ON 12/07/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - RETURN TO SENDER."
